/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/lajolla.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o lajolla  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/gauravjoshi/Desktop/Learn/lajolla_public/embree/lib-macos/arm64 /Users/gauravjoshi/Desktop/Learn/lajolla_public/embree/lib-macos/arm64/libembree4.dylib liblajolla_lib.a /Users/gauravjoshi/Desktop/Learn/lajolla_public/embree/lib-macos/arm64/libembree4.dylib
